members.name: Spawn Vehicle Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and vehicle(s) selected.
When one of the grouped triggers is triggered all of the grouped vehicles will spawn and attach to their targeted path nodes.

members.name: Move Vehicle Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and vehicle(s) selected.
When one of the grouped triggers is triggered all of the grouped vehicles will start moving along their vehicle paths (vehicle must be spawned first)

members.name: Delete Vehicle Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and vehicle(s) selected
When one of the grouped triggers is triggered all of the grouped vehicles will be deleted (works well to get rid of a vehicle that will never be seen by the player again)

members.name: Vehicle Riders Group
members.help:
Must have spawner(s) and 1 vehicle selected
The grouped AI will ride on/in the grouped vehicle. The spawners automatically spawn when the vehicle is spawned

members.name: Vehicle Riders Position
members.help:
Must have spawner(s) selected
Sets the position that this AI will ride in vehicle.

members.name: Walk With Vehicle Group
members.help:
Must have spawner(s) and 1 vehicle selected
The grouped AI will walk beside the grouped vehicle. The spawners automatically spawn when the vehicle is spawned

members.name: Vehicle Attack Group
members.help:
Must have an vehicle node and vehicle(s) selected
When a vehicle gets to the selected vehicle node it will begin to attack all of the grouped vehicles on the opposing team. These grouped vehicles will automatically return fire

members.name: Set Team
members.help:
Must have vehicle(s) selected
Specifies which team a vehicle belongs to so other vehicles know who their enemies are

members.name: Set Crash Type
members.help:
Must have vehicle node(s) selected
Node must first be grouped with another node using 'vehicle detour'. Then set this value on the first node of the crash path.

When a vehicle is killed it will find the next available crash path that it hasn't passed and take that path when it gets there.

default: once a vehicle has used this crash path other vehicles wont be able to use it (should use this most of the time)

plane: multiple vehicles can take this crash path (causing vehicles to pile up at the end of the path). This is usually only helpful for planes that pileup off the screen or get deleted at the end of their paths.

forced: all vehicles (including a vehicle that is still alive) will take this crash path. Only one vehicle will use the path.

members.name: Vehicle Unload
members.help: Must have a vehicle node selected.  Sets group to unload at this node.

members.name: Kill Spawner Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and spawner(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of spawners will be deleted.

members.name: Init Scene Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and scene(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of scenes will initialize.

members.name: Play Scene Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and scene(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of scenes will play.

members.name: Stop Scene Group
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and scene(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of scenes will stop.

members.name: Enable Spawn Points
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and coop spawn point(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of spawnpoints will be enabled.

members.name: Disable Spawn Points
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and coop spawn point(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, this group of spawnpoints will be disabled.

members.name: Regroup (catch up teleport) Spawn Points
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) and coop spawn point(s) selected.
When the trigger hits, any players lagging behind will respawn at these spawn points to catch up to the other players.

members.name: Regroup Distance
members.help:
Must have trigger(s) selected.
Will force other players to teleport to grouped spawn points regardless of distance.
